{{Infobox character
| name = Brother Aekin
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
| name = Brother Aekin
| aliases = Aekin
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Uncrowned
| abilities = Path modeled after the Wandering Titan, Enforcer technique
| affiliations = Abyssal Palace
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

''See also: [[Brother Aekin Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Brother Aekin, also known as Aekin, was an [[Uncrowned]] member of the [[Abyssal Palace]], a cult dedicated to the [[Wandering Titan]]. He was characterized by his slate gray or black and brown [[sacred artist]]'s robes and a dark stone mask carved to look like a snarling creature, featuring a glowing yellow light in its right eye socket. In combat, Aekin utilized a hammer and various magical abilities, including [[Striker]] and [[Ruler techniques]], as well as an [[Enforcer technique]] that manifested as translucent yellow madra armor. His [[Path]] focused on endurance, allowing him to survive significant physical trauma, such as broken limbs and a damaged neck. Despite his combat skills and ability to conjure golden light and stone fragments, he was eventually defeated and killed during a confrontation in the [[Hollow Domain]].}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|An [[Uncrowned]] of [[Abyssal Palace]], Brother Aekin arrived wearing hooded [[sacred artist]]’s robes and a stone mask featuring a single glowing yellow eye. Having undergone early training under [[Maraan]], he utilized an endurance-based [[Path]] modeled after the [[Wandering Titan]]. During a tournament, he served as Ziel's rematch opponent and became the target of Ziel's brief rampage. Although [[Lindon]] believed he could defeat him, Aekin was unable to handle the same opponents faced by [[Lindon]]. Ultimately, he competed against Sophara and was obliterated by her after using his [[Enforcer technique]] to take on the aspect of the [[Wandering Titan]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]] is from [[Abyssal Palace]] and wears hooded [[sacred artist]]’s robes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Maraan]] oversaw the early training of [[Brother Aekin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]] could not handle the opponents [[Lindon]] faced.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]] is Ziel's rematch opponent.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]]'s [[Path]] is modeled after the [[Wandering Titan]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]]'s [[Path]] emphasizes endurance.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]] was the target of Ziel's brief rampage.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]] is a person [[Lindon]] thought he could beat.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara would fight [[Brother Aekin]] in the tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]] was obliterated by Sophara.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Aekin was wearing a stone mask with one eye glowing yellow.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]] competed against Sophara.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]] used his [[Enforcer technique]] to take on the aspect of the [[Wandering Titan]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]] is an [[Uncrowned]] of [[Abyssal Palace]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Abyssal Palace]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
